title: My Dear Soldiers
source: Sample Grade 7, Unit 5 — My Dear Soldiers

lines.t: Oh! Defenders of borders, you are great sons of my land. When we are all asleep, you still hold on to your deed.
Windy season or snowy days, or scorching sun's sweltering rays — you are there guarding all the time awake.
Treading the lonely expanses as yogis, climbing the heights or striding the valleys, defending the deserts or guarding the marshes.
Surveillance in seas and by securing the air — prime of your youth given to the nation!
Wind chimes of my land vibrate your feat. We pray for you brave men! May the Lord bless you all!
This poem was written by A.P.J. Abdul Kalam, the scientist and former President of India, as a heartfelt tribute to the soldiers who protect our nation.

author: A. P. J. Abdul Kalam
